title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMNatural
description: A natural feature from OpenStreetMap tagged with natural=*. Describes geographical features such as water bodies, woods, scrub, peaks, beaches, etc

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMNatural

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification

naturalType.description: Property. The OSM natural tag classifying the geological or physical feature. Enum:'water, wood, tree, scrub, heath, grassland, peak, ridge, bare_rock, sand, beach, coastline, spring, cave_entrance, wetland...'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:natural'

water.description: Property. Type of water body if natural=water (e.g. lake, reservoir, river, pond). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:water'

leafType.description: Property. The leaf type of trees or woods. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:leaf_type'

leafCycle.description: Property. The leaf cycle of trees or woods. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:leaf_cycle'

elevation.description: Property. Elevation (ele) of the feature in metres above sea level, typically for peaks. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ele'

wetland.description: Property. Type of wetland if natural=wetland (e.g. swamp, bog, marsh). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wetland'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources
